# Let's read the file and search for spans.
path = "/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
raw[:1000], len(raw)

path = "/mnt/data/file-53dKFrWJphRYhe9NDZke4Z-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
raw[:1000], len(raw)

# Let's search for the candidate spans in raw
candidates = [
    ("إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُكُمْ أَنْ تُؤَدُّوا الْأَمَانَاتِ إِلَى أَهْلِهَا", "Aya"),
    ("يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَقُولُوا قَوْلًا سَدِيدًا", "Aya"),
    ("إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُكُمْ أَنْ تُؤَدُّوا الْأَمَانَاتِ إِلَى أَهْلِهَا", "Aya"),
    ("وَأَوْفُوا الْكَيْلَ إِذَا كِلْتُمْ وَزِنُوا بِالْقِسْطَاسِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ ذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ وَأَحْسَنُ تَأْوِيلًا", "Aya"),
    ("آية المنافق ثلاث: إذا حدث كذب، وإذا وعد أخلف، وإذا اؤتمن خان", "Hadith"),
]
occurrences = []
for substr, typ in candidates:
    start = raw.find(substr)
    if start == -1:
        print("Not found:", substr[:60], "...")
        continue
    end = start + len(substr)
    occurrences.append({"start":start,"end":end,"text":substr,"type":typ})
occurrences

# find all occurrences for Aya1 substring; also for the identical text used twice
s = "إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُكُمْ أَنْ تُؤَدُّوا الْأَمَانَاتِ إِلَى أَهْلِهَا"
starts = []
idx = raw.find(s, 0)
while idx != -1:
    starts.append(idx)
    idx = raw.find(s, idx+1)
starts, len(starts)

raw_text = raw
def spans_for(substr, typ, occurrences=None):
    spans = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        idx = raw_text.find(substr, start)
        if idx == -1:
            break
        spans.append((idx, idx+len(substr)))
        start = idx+1
    return spans

# compute all spans for the given substrings
s1 = "إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُكُمْ أَنْ تُؤَدُّوا الْأَمَانَاتِ إِلَى أَهْلِهَا"
s2 = "يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَقُولُوا قَوْلًا سَدِيدًا"
s3 = "وَأَوْفُوا الْكَيْلَ إِذَا كِلْتُمْ وَزِنُوا بِالْقِسْطَاسِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ ذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ وَأَحْسَنُ تَأْوِيلًا"
s4 = "آية المنافق ثلاث: إذا حدث كذب، وإذا وعد أخلف، وإذا اؤتمن خان"

sp1 = spans_for(s1, "Aya")
sp2 = spans_for(s2, "Aya")
sp3 = spans_for(s3, "Aya")
sp4 = spans_for(s4, "Hadith")
sp1, sp2, sp3, sp4

spans = []
# Build them precisely
spans.append({"span_start":188, "span_end":259, "span_text": s1, "citation_type":"Aya"})
spans.append({"span_start":475, "span_end":546, "span_text": s1, "citation_type":"Aya"})
spans.append({"span_start":342, "span_end":416, "span_text": s2, "citation_type":"Aya"})
spans.append({"span_start":615, "span_end":726, "span_text": s3, "citation_type":"Aya"})
spans.append({"span_start":783, "span_end":843, "span_text": s4, "citation_type":"Hadith"})
import json
print(json.dumps({"citations": spans}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
